scripts.dev:fresh: pkill -f "next dev|next start|next-server" || true && rm -rf apps/web/.next web/.next && npm run dev --workspace @inventracker/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @inventracker/shared && npm run build --workspace @inventracker/web && npm run build:apphosting:prepare && npm run build --workspace @inventracker/functions
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @inventracker/web && npm run lint --workspace @inventracker/functions && npm run lint --workspace @inventracker/shared && npm run lint --workspace @inventracker/ui
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @inventracker/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @inventracker/functions && npm run typecheck --workspace @inventracker/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @inventracker/ui
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @inventracker/functions && npm run test --workspace @inventracker/shared
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run check:single-engine && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:rules && npm run test:e2e
